title: potentilla × suberecta
intro: Potentilla × suberecta, also known as the dwarf potentilla, is a hybrid flowering plant that belongs to the rose family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Potentilla × suberecta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even exhibit antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
